issues.title: Batching strategy improvements
issues.body: In the `TokenCountBatchingStrategy` implementation, pre-compute the token count in documents so that it can fail fast before iterating through the documents. For more details, see [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/1215/files#diff-0f34ff0cc148a880e660095cb82c36b8338a909491d8e8d756a71a6e19229f34R87).

issues.title: Add observability support for Chat Client Advisors
issues.body: Following the #1243 and #1206 , extend the observability to support the ChatClient RequestResponseAdvisors.
